scripts.build:isolated: bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-build-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf "%s" "$scope" | tr -cs "[:alnum:]_-" "-"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json "$tsconfig"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE="$scope" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH="$tsconfig"; next build "$@"' --
scripts.start:isolated: bash -lc ': "${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:?Set ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE to the same value used for build}"; next start "$@"' --
scripts.type-check:isolated: bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-typecheck-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf "%s" "$scope" | tr -cs "[:alnum:]_-" "-"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json "$tsconfig"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE="$scope" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH="$tsconfig"; next typegen && tsc -p "$tsconfig" --noEmit --incremental false'
scripts.verify:isolated: bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-verify-$PPID}; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE="$scope"; bun run type-check:isolated && bun run lint:isolated && bun run build:isolated'
